name: critic_metformin_discontinuation_no_citation_rejects
description: Synthesizer emits a 'discontinue metformin' claim cited only against an eGFR lab packet — no openFDA label, no ADA guideline. The critic must REJECT on the medication-discontinuation guardrail.
what_bug_this_catches: If the dose-change regex stops matching 'discontinu' (e.g., regex narrows to only 'taper|hold'), a draft suggesting metformin discontinuation without an openFDA label citation would slip through. This case pins the discontinuation branch of the guardrail.
